provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Sisal (Compulsory Marketing) Order.
No producer or agent of a producer of sisal shall sell or otherwise dispose of sisal except through the Tanzania Sisal Authority.

This Order shall apply throughout Mainland Tanzania.
